name: Obsidian Oni

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the unusual_defense abilities of other models.

triggers.name: Brawling
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Obsidian Gaze
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)1" of the target. The target gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: The Strong Become Stronger
triggers.text: Allies within (aura)1" of the target heal 1.

triggers.name: Flames from Beyond
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Rifts in Reality
actions.effects: Make a Rift marker anywhere within range.

extraction_notes: Armor ability has unusual_defense icon but reads 'Once per activation'
Ruthless text contains unusual_defense icon rendered as bold icon in original
